recent_projects.name: abstract-clipit
recent_projects.summary: Built using PyQt6, it provides a drag-and-drop interface, a file system browser, and a logging console, enabling users to easily copy file contents to the clipboard, parse Python files for functions and imports, and manage file extensions and directories dynamically.
recent_projects.author: putkoff

recent_projects.name: rnftools
recent_projects.summary: RNF framework for NGS: simulation of reads, evaluation of mappers, conversion of RNF-compliant data.
recent_projects.author: Karel Brinda
